description: CF-WR632AX WiFi 6 travel router (MT7981B Filogic 830, 2.5G WAN)

recovery-http.description: U-Boot HTTP recovery (hold reset 10s while powering on, release on 5 green LED flashes)
recovery-http.reset_instructions: Unplug power. Hold reset button. Plug in USB-C power. Wait for green LED to flash 5 times, release reset. Do NOT hold past 7 flashes (triggers U-Boot netconsole instead).

tftp.description: U-Boot TFTP recovery (hold reset >7s while powering on)

recovery.source: research (forum + device tree, not yet pcap-verified)

notes.known_issue_bootloop: Snapshot builds after r34488-059f801a2c (May 2026) cause bootloop due to U-Boot v2026.01 + TF-A 20260123 regression. Use stable release 25.12.x. See https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt/issues/23430
notes.hardware_family: Same MT7981B+MT7976CN platform as GL.iNet Beryl AX (GL-MT3000) and Cudy TR3000 v1
notes.recovery_note: Reset button timing matters: 5 green flashes = HTTP recovery, >7 flashes = U-Boot netconsole/TFTP
notes.uart_recovery: Advanced recovery via mtk_uartboot with bl2 + fip files (see github.com/andros-ua/owrt-misc/tree/main/cf-wr632ax)
